description: lotto brings out a flip flop for F1 lovers. These flip flops features F1 themed print on its comfy footbed with heavy duty straps. Wear this with denims rolled up at the hem and bright tees. Upper Fabric and synthetic leather panelling on the thong-style straps Fabric toe separator for comfort Racing themed print on the straps Soft rubber footbed with cushioning for optimum comfort Outsole TPU outsole with branding and patterned lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
